MOSES-WITCHS_CUPCAKE.title: Witch's Cupcake
MOSES-DARK_BARRIER.title: Dark Barrier Potion
MOSES-DARK_BARRIER.description: Blocked damage reflected back to your attacker this turn.
MOSES-CLEANSY_POTION.title: Cleansy Potion
MOSES-THUNDERSHOWER_POTION.title: Thundershower Potion
MOSES-THUNDERSHOWER_POTION.description: Apply [blue]1[/blue][gold]Weak[/gold] to all enemies and remove half of their [gold]block[/gold]. If your current [green]HP[/green] is below [red]50%[/red], remove [gold]all of their block[/gold]. It rains more if the user is depressed.
MOSES-BOOM_POTION.title: Boom Potion
MOSES-BOOM_POTION.description: Deal damage equal to [green]HP[/green] lost this combat to [gold]ALL[/gold] other creatures.
MOSES-GOLD_POTION.title: Gold Coin Pouch
MOSES-GOLD_POTION.description: Gain [gold]50%[/gold] of current gold.(up to [blue]50[/blue] gold).
